full_text:
Bao Tao 鮑韜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bao Tao (鮑韜). Younger brother of Bao Xin who accompanied him against Dong Zhuo. Died in battle. Bao Tao was affiliated with Bao Xin. Bao Tao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
